tagline: Wear your vibe. Stick your story. Customize everything.
about1: STXTR is a small accessories brand built on one big idea: your stuff should look as unique as you are. We believe accessories are an extension of your personality — and we're here to help you express it.
about2: From canvas pouches loaded with patches to bold phone case stickers, everything we make is designed to be personal, giftable, and a little extra — in the best way.
